co2.error: Extremely low efficiency or probe not deep enough

o2.error: Secondary Air Pump active or massive exhaust leak

integrity_check.warning: Total gas volume low. Check probe placement in tailpipe.

health_penalties.warning: Severe NOx ({nox} ppm) - possible cooling system, EGR, or catalyst failure
Elevated NOx ({nox} ppm) with lean mixture - check EGR and cooling system

diagnostic_matrix.name: Vacuum Leak (Differential)
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Unmetered air detected at idle. Airflow stabilizes at higher RPM.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Inspect intake manifold gaskets, vacuum hoses, and brake booster.

diagnostic_matrix.name: Catalytic Converter Dead
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Engine mix is perfect (Stoich), but the Catalyst is not oxidizing pollutants.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Replace Catalytic Converter. Check for old misfire codes that may have melted it.

diagnostic_matrix.name: Exhaust Dilution (False Lean)
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Bretschneider vs Measured Lambda mismatch. Atmospheric air is entering the tailpipe.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Find and seal the exhaust leak near the O2 sensor or flange.

diagnostic_matrix.name: Ignition Misfire
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Raw fuel and air detected together. Spark was not triggered.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Check spark plugs, ignition coils, and high-tension leads immediately.

diagnostic_matrix.name: Systemic Rich Mixture
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Engine is over-fueling across all ranges. Lambda control is lost.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Check fuel pressure regulator, leaky injectors, or coolant temp sensor.

diagnostic_matrix.name: High NOx + Lean Idle (EGR/Cooling Failure)
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: High NOx with lean idle indicates EGR system not recirculating or cooling system deficiency allowing excessive combustion temperatures.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Check EGR valve operation, EGR cooler, engine coolant temperature, and thermostat.

diagnostic_matrix.name: High NOx + Timing Over-Advanced (Knock/VVT Issue)
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: High NOx with near-stoichiometric mixture and clean burn suggests excessive ignition advance raising peak combustion temperature.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Check knock sensor operation, VVT/cam phaser, base timing, and for carbon buildup increasing compression.

diagnostic_matrix.name: Vacuum Leak (Differential - High Idle Confirms)
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Lean at low idle but normal at high idle confirms unmetered air entering at idle only. Vacuum leak is speed-dependent.
diagnostic_matrix.action: Smoke test intake manifold, check vacuum hoses, brake booster, PCV valve, and throttle body gasket.

diagnostic_matrix.name: Healthy Engine
diagnostic_matrix.verdict: Combustion and conversion are operating at peak efficiency.
diagnostic_matrix.action: No action required. Maintain regular service intervals.
